title: Middle East crisis: Trump says US 'close to meeting objectives', opposes ceasefire with Iran
summary_full: President Trump stated the U.S. is nearing its military objectives in the Middle East concerning Iran, aiming to degrade its missile capabilities and defense industry. He firmly rejected a ceasefire, asserting the U.S. is "obliterating the other side" and has "won." Trump also indicated other nations should guard the Strait of Hormuz.
